chunks.title: 21_Grid Rows
chunks.text: Now as we have grid column property, we have grid row property which defines the starting and ending position of any item inside the row. So if we want an item particular, let's suppose we have some kind of layout like this, in which we want an item which starts from line number 1 to line number 3, this is line 2, this is line 4. So let's suppose we want our item to start from here to here,

chunks.text: So let's suppose we want our item to start from here to here, to occupy the entire vertical line, so for that we can write its starting number 1 and ending number 3. chunks.title: 21_Grid Rows
chunks.text: So the grid row start is starting row 1 and ending row is 3 equal to us, so starting row 1 came and because we had 4 equal rows, then we occupied 2 of them, line number 1, line number 2 and line number 3 terms. So what we can do is, we can write both in short form, so we can simply write our grid row, after grid row we will write 1 slash 3, save, refresh. So what happened, no layout change, we can write 1 slash 4, what will happen with writing 1 slash 4, it will occupy even third row,

chunks.title: 21_Grid Rows
chunks.text: So what happened, no layout change, we can write 1 slash 4, what will happen with writing 1 slash 4, it will occupy even third row, so it has occupied third row also, and apart from this we can also do 1 slash span 3, so 1 slash span 3 means that start row from first line, and after that I want 3 rows, how much span will be, how much area will be occupied, equal to 3 rows. So we will refresh it, it has occupied area equal to first row, equal to second row and equal to third row.

chunks.title: 21_Grid Rows
chunks.text: So we will refresh it, it has occupied area equal to first row, equal to second row and equal to third row. If its height and width were set, then even if we don't occupy the content area of the individual item, but that space is reserved for it, meaning this first row, second row, third row space is reserved only for this item number 2. So in this way we can decide its column and its row for our grid.

full_text: Now as we have grid column property, we have grid row property which defines the starting and ending position of any item inside the row. So if we want an item particular, let's suppose we have some kind of layout like this, in which we want an item which starts from line number 1 to line number 3, this is line 2, this is line 4. So let's suppose we want our item to start from here to here, to occupy the entire vertical line, so for that we can write its starting number 1 and ending number 3. Now the second item which is number 2, let's do the same thing, let's give it a class, let's give it class 2, save, here we write dot 2, for this we will write grid row, grid row start, if we want to write grid row start, then for start we want to write value 1 and for grid row end we want to write value 3, we will save it as refresh. So what happened with that, now we are getting priority from 1 because we have written 2 in CSS, so we will get priority from it. So the grid row start is starting row 1 and ending row is 3 equal to us, so starting row 1 came and because we had 4 equal rows, then we occupied 2 of them, line number 1, line number 2 and line number 3 terms. So what we can do is, we can write both in short form, so we can simply write our grid row, after grid row we will write 1 slash 3, save, refresh. So what happened, no layout change, we can write 1 slash 4, what will happen with writing 1 slash 4, it will occupy even third row, so it has occupied third row also, and apart from this we can also do 1 slash span 3, so 1 slash span 3 means that start row from first line, and after that I want 3 rows, how much span will be, how much area will be occupied, equal to 3 rows. So we will refresh it, it has occupied area equal to first row, equal to second row and equal to third row. If its height and width were set, then even if we don't occupy the content area of the individual item, but that space is reserved for it, meaning this first row, second row, third row space is reserved only for this item number 2. So in this way we can decide its column and its row for our grid.
